hero.title: Stay Connected
hero.body: Buy your eSIM online. Activate in 2 minutes, travel immediately in 190+ countries.

payment.title: Payment
payment.stripeNote: 🔒 Card entry is securely handled by Stripe

cgu.label: I have read and accept the {cguLink} and the {privacyLink}.

payment.withdrawalNote: In accordance with Article L221-28 of the Consumer Code, you acknowledge that the eSIM delivery begins immediately after payment and expressly waive your right of withdrawal.

cguRequired.title: Terms and Conditions
cguRequired.message: Please accept the Terms and Conditions to continue.

reservationNotFound.title: Error
reservationNotFound.message: Reservation not found, please try again.

stockExhausted.title: Stock exhausted
stockExhausted.message: This offer is no longer available.

reservationExpired.title: Reservation expired
reservationExpired.message: Your reservation has expired. Please try again.

details.title: Your eSIM is ready 🎉
details.emailBanner: 📧 An email with your activation code has been sent to

activationCode.label: 🔑 Activation code
activationCode.hint: Scan the QR code or copy the text code and enter it manually in settings. Take a screenshot to find it easily.

details.qrSub: Scanning with the Camera app doesn't work — use network settings

provisioningError.text: Your payment has been received but your eSIM could not be activated automatically.
provisioningError.contact: Contact us at support@ilotel.com with this reference. We will send your eSIM within 24h.

esim.title:
eSIM, the SIM
without the card
esim.subtitle: A digital SIM, directly integrated into your phone.
bullets: No physical card to insert — everything is digital
Activate your plan in 2 minutes, even before you leave
Coverage in 190+ countries, without surprise roaming fees

compat.subtitle_ios: iPhone XS, XR (2018) and later versions support eSIM.
compat.subtitle_android: Most high-end Android devices since 2018 support eSIM.
bullets_ios: iPhone XS/XR, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15 — all models (Pro, Plus, Max)
Settings → General → Information → Available Cellular Plan
Check that your iPhone is not carrier locked
bullets_android: Pixel 3+, Samsung Galaxy S20+, Xiaomi 12+, OnePlus 11+…
Network & Internet → SIM → Add SIM (if the option exists)
Check that your device is not carrier locked

destination.title:
Find your
destination
destination.subtitle: Search for a country or filter by region to find your ideal eSIM.
bullets: Type the country name in the search bar
Filter by region: Europe, Asia, Americas, Africa…
Check the Promos tab for the best offers

offer.title:
Choose
your plan
offer.subtitle: Each destination offers several plans according to your needs.
bullets: Select the data amount (GB) and duration (days)
Promotional offers are highlighted in orange
Press Order → and pay securely via Stripe

activate.subtitle: After ordering, you receive an activation code by email and in the app.
bullets_ios: Take a screenshot or copy the activation code displayed
Settings → Cellular → Add Cellular Plan → Enter information manually
Your eSIM activates automatically upon arrival in the country — bon voyage!
bullets_android: Take a screenshot or copy the activation code displayed
Network & Internet → SIM → Add SIM → Enter activation code
Your eSIM activates automatically upon arrival in the country — bon voyage!

errors.OFFER_NOT_FOR_SALE: This offer is not available for purchase.
errors.STOCK_EXHAUSTED: This offer is out of stock.
errors.EMAIL_REQUIRED: A valid email address is required.
errors.RESERVATION_EXPIRED: This reservation has expired or has already been processed.
errors.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: An internal error occurred. Please try again.
errors.PATH_NOT_FOUND: The requested resource could not be found.
errors.NETWORK_UNAVAILABLE: Network error. Please check your connection.
